mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC A, TWORK_INFO_IVAT D, TWORK_MST_LC B, TWORK_MST_AR C, TWORK_MST_IC E WHERE A.IVATKEY = D.IVATKEY AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.LCKEY = B.LCKEY AND A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND B.ARKEY = C.ARKEY AND E.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND E.OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND E.ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND A.TTQTY > 0 AND A.CTKEY = '100'
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}

SELECT SUM(A.TTQTY) AS TTQTY ,SUM(A.AVQTY) AS AVQTY ,SUM(A.ALQTY) AS ALQTY ,SUM(A.PIQTY) AS PIQTY ,SUM(A.PAQTY) AS PAQTY ,SUM(A.HOQTY) AS HOQTY FROM (
) A
